title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・我が心、盛大に

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's race begins, and I gulp
nervously as I watch her tear down the track.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Why, hi there!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did I surprise you? Sorry, I'd love to chat,
but there's someone important I have to keep an
eye on.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You're in the same boat, aren't you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky gazes at the track, where Sakura
Chiyono O is rounding a turn.
choice_data_list: You can do it, Chiyono O!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And they're heading up the hill! This is it!
Everything boils down to this final straight!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Looks like Chiyono O is struggling. Who's going
to take first?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: (My lungs... they burn.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Crack...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Huff! Almost... there...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(My heart feels like it's about to explode. Every
time it squeezes, it's like it's going to break...)

text_block_list.name: Creek & Oguri
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaah!
Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Creeeak... Crack!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: It feels like my body's falling apart.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Like if I keep going, everything that makes me
who I am will start cracking off in big chunks.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...I'm scared.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
My body is falling to pieces and disintegrating. I
don't want to see whatever miserable future is
ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: This...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRACK!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Don't you dare fall apart!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Don't break apart—break free!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
She's right! You're still not willing to surrender
your pride, are you?! Then it's time to stop
clinging to things from the past!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: And once you've steeled yourself to do that...

text_block_list.name: Ardan & Yaeno
text_block_list.text: I—

text_block_list.name: Ardan & Yaeno
text_block_list.text: I will defeat you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O turns and faces forward once
more!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Go, Oguri! Pull ahead! Inari's right behind you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: You've got this, Creek! You've gotta win this one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd is stirred to a frenzy as they cheer for
the racers on the track. Most of them are rooting
for the Eternal Top Three.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With all this noise, she probably won't hear me no
matter how loudly I yell, but still! I have to try!
choice_data_list: Chiyono O! You can do iiit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't go back to who I was before! I won't... I
won't go back!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'm going to become... a new me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Can it be the cherry blossoms are blooming again
in fall?! Sakura Chiyono O has taken the lead!
She's keeping steady and—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O has crossed the finish line!
Sakura Chiyono O is the winner!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Congrats, Chiyo.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I won. I won!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You see? As long as you don't give up on
yourself, you can seize the most beautiful
rewards!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you can't just—Maruzen?! Wh-what are you
doing here?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'll explain myself later. ♪ I promise I won't be a
nuisance, though.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Chiyo! You get it now, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I do...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Just now, you found a new you and a new way to
run.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And I have a feeling I know why—your rivals
pushed you on.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Exactly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Good answer. Your way of thinking is exactly why
you're my rival.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
As long as passion burns in our hearts, we can
continue running.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now then, my greedy little wolf... This win wasn't
enough to sate you. You're still starving for more.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Let's you and I duke it out next.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Make sure you help Chiyo make it to that
stage.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: U-unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky the Beast has declared Sakura
Chiyono O as her rival! What's more, she's
challenged her to race in this year's Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd's cheers are so loud, it measures on the
Richter scale, sending palpable tremors through
Tokyo Racecourse itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll carry that enthusiasm with us to the
promised race. We're on our way to the Japan
Cup!
